elements.content:
JavaScript makes pages interactive

- Runs with the web page
- Reacts to user actions
- Updates what you see

Browser runtime listens

- Clicks become events
- Keystrokes become events
- JavaScript handles them fast

Change page text

- Find the #status element
- Set its text
- The page shows Ready

React to a click

- Find the button
- Listen for click
- Change #status to Clicked!

JavaScript in one sentence

- Runs in the browser
- Listens for actions
- Changes the page instantly
